parts.label: Battery 80Ah AGM
parts.function: AGM lead-acid battery mounted in the front trunk supplying 12 V to all vehicle electrical systems and enabling engine start.

parts.label: Alternator ~150A
parts.function: Belt-driven generator that charges the battery and powers the vehicle electrical system at approximately 150 A output while the engine is running.

parts.label: Starter Motor
parts.function: Electric motor that cranks the flat-six engine during start; engages the flywheel ring gear via a solenoid-actuated pinion.

parts.label: Junction Box / Fuse Boxes
parts.function: Front and rear power distribution centres housing blade fuses, maxi-fuses, and relay carriers that protect and route all primary electrical circuits.

parts.label: PSM Module (Stability Management ECU)
parts.function: Porsche Stability Management control unit; processes wheel-speed, yaw, and lateral-acceleration signals to modulate ABS, traction control, and torque vectoring interventions.

parts.label: BCM Front (Body Control Module)
parts.function: Front body control module governing exterior lighting, horn, rain/light sensor integration, and comfort-entry functions.

parts.label: Instrument Cluster / Combi-Instrument
parts.function: Central driver display combining an analogue rev-counter with digital speedometer, fuel/oil gauges, warning indicators, and PCM trip computer readouts.

parts.label: Sport Chrono Module
parts.function: Sport Chrono option control unit that manages dynamic engine and chassis map switching, logs lap times, and interfaces with the stopwatch display in the instrument cluster.

parts.label: Sport Chrono Drive Mode Switch
parts.function: Rotary selector on the steering wheel or centre console allowing the driver to step through Normal, Sport, Sport Plus, and Individual drive modes, sending mode requests to the Sport Chrono module.
